requirement_topic.en: Battery Regulation and Labeling Context in Georgia
requirement_topic.zh: 格鲁吉亚的电池法规与标签语境
requirement_topic.zht: 喬治亞的電池法規與標籤語境

summary.en: Georgia applies EU-derived principles in several product areas through GEOSTM alignment paths, including battery safety, marking and post-market responsibilities for some imported portable battery classes. Where grid and power conditions match (220/380 V, 50 Hz), voltage adaptation is generally not the binding issue; documentation, labeling format, and responsible-party control are more frequently inspected. Exporters should verify whether label language, model coding, and traceability fields satisfy Georgian officer expectations.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚在若干产品领域通过GEOSTM的对接路径采用欧盟派生原则，包括部分进口便携式电池的安全、标签和投放后责任要求。由于电压条件已匹配（220/380V、50Hz），电气电压适配通常不是主要问题，监管更关注标签表达、文档链和责任主体。出口商应核查标签语言、型号代码及追溯字段是否符合当地监管期待。
summary.zht: 喬治亞在若干產品領域通過GEOSTM的對接路徑採用歐盟衍生原則，包括部分進口便攜式電池的安全、標籤和投放後責任要求。由於電壓條件已匹配（220/380V、50Hz），電氣電壓適配通常不是主要問題，監管更關注標籤表達、文件鏈和責任主體。出口商應核查標籤語言、型號代碼及追溯字段是否符合當地監管期待。

standards_or_laws: GEOSTM alignment communications on CE-style requirements for selected imported electronic goods
Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 used as comparative baseline for battery marking and lifecycle expectations
GEOSTM and customs technical documentation notices for battery-related goods

summary.en: China’s direct regulatory baseline for these products remains GB 31241 with CCC overlays in relevant domestic categories, which is a different architecture from Georgia’s import-market surveillance expectations. Chinese documents are domestic safety baselines, while Georgia comparisons focus on market-entry documentation and labeling expectations tied to imported goods handling.
summary.zh: 中国对应体系以GB 31241为主，且部分类别叠加CCC认证，结构上与格鲁吉亚进口市场监督不同。中国文件偏重国内安全底线，而格鲁吉亚更关注进口商品的市场入场文件与标签合规。
summary.zht: 中國對應體系以GB 31241為主，且部分類別疊加CCC認證，結構上與喬治亞進口市場監督不同。中國文件偏重國內安全底線，而喬治亞更關注進口商品的市場入場文件與標籤合規。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — domestic product safety standard for portable secondary lithium cells and batteries
CNCA CCC catalogue and related implementation notices
Chinese export declaration and customs documentation rules

gap.en: The practical gap is governance and documentation. Chinese exporters should align technical file structure, language, and product coding to Georgia import practice, while keeping GB 31241 as a baseline rather than a terminal compliance condition. There is no one-to-one legal substitution between GB/CNAS/CCC evidence and GEOSTM-aligned market-control requirements.
gap.zh: 现实差距主要在治理与文件化。中国出口商应将技术文件、语言和产品编码适配格鲁吉亚进口实践，GB 31241可作技术底线但不能作为终局合规条件。GB/CNAS/CCC材料与GEOSTM对口的市场控制要求不存在一一替代关系。
gap.zht: 現實差距主要在治理與文件化。中國出口商應將技術文件、語言和產品編碼適配喬治亞進口實踐，GB 31241可作技術底線但不能作為終局合規條件。GB/CNAS/CCC材料與GEOSTM對口的市場控制要求不存在一一替代關係。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation where GEOSTM applies in practice for imported product classes — labeling, traceability and post-market responsibility expectations should be met before Georgia market placement.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market scope only in China — GB 31241 and CCC obligations do not include Georgia-specific market surveillance and label-language expectations.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Georgian placement commonly uses EU-derived logic for battery products, so exporters should map each lot to local marking, traceability and responsible-party expectations, while keeping Chinese GB 31241 materials as engineering evidence only. Voltage compatibility is generally positive, but regulatory documentation remains the core gap.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 格鲁吉亚投放普遍采用欧盟衍生逻辑，出口商应将每批产品映射到本地标签、追溯与责任主体要求，并将GB 31241资料作为工程依据而非终局合规证据。电压匹配通常是加分项，真正差距在监管文件体系。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喬治亞投放普遍採用歐盟衍生邏輯，出口商應將每批產品映射到本地標籤、追溯與責任主體要求，並將GB 31241資料作為工程依據而非終局合規證據。電壓匹配通常是加分項，真正差距在監管文件體系。
